channel.title: Aws on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Aws on Arrans github.io

item.title: danny-avila/LibreChat
item.description: Enhanced ChatGPT Clone: Features Agents, DeepSeek, Anthropic, AWS, OpenAI, Assistants API, Azure, Groq, o1, GPT-4o, Mistral, OpenRouter, Vertex AI, Gemini, Artifacts, AI model switching, message search, Code Interpreter, langchain, DALL-E-3, OpenAPI Actions, Functions, Secure Multi-User Auth, Presets, open-source for self-hosting. Active project.

item.title: localstack/localstack
item.description: 💻 A fully functional local AWS cloud stack. Develop and test your cloud & Serverless apps offline

item.title: cloudquery/cloudquery
item.description: The developer first cloud governance platform

item.title: getsops/sops
item.description: Simple and flexible tool for managing secrets

item.title: nccgroup/ScoutSuite
item.description: Multi-Cloud Security Auditing Tool

item.title: fwdcloudsec/granted
item.description: The easiest way to access AWS.

item.title: aws/aws-sam-cli
item.description: CLI tool to build, test, debug, and deploy Serverless applications using AWS SAM

item.title: markushinz/aws-ses-pop3-server
item.description: The missing POP3 💌 server for Amazon Simple Email Service - written in golang.

item.title: ilyas-it83/CloudComparer
item.description: Compare the various managed cloud services offered by the major public cloud providers in the market.

item.title: donnemartin/saws
item.description: A supercharged AWS command line interface (CLI).

item.title: github-aws-runners/terraform-aws-github-runner
item.description: Terraform module for scalable GitHub action runners on AWS

item.title: aws/containers-roadmap
item.description: This is the public roadmap for AWS container services (ECS, ECR, Fargate, and EKS).

item.title: google/go-cloud
item.description: The Go Cloud Development Kit (Go CDK): A library and tools for open cloud development in Go.

item.title: lusingander/stu
item.description: TUI explorer application for Amazon S3 (AWS S3) 🪣

item.title: aws/aws-iot-device-sdk-embedded-C
item.description: SDK for connecting to AWS IoT from a device using embedded C.

item.title: rebuy-de/aws-nuke
item.description: Nuke a whole AWS account and delete all its resources.

item.title: padok-team/yatas
item.description: 🦉🔎 A simple tool to audit your AWS/GCP infrastructure for misconfiguration or potential security issues with plugins integration

item.title: 0x4447/0x4447_product_s3_email
item.description: 📫 A serverless email server on AWS using S3 and SES
